---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

**Workflow affected**
Which workflow file has the issue? (e.g. owasp-baseline-reusable.yml)

**What happened**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**What you expected**
What should have happened instead.

**Workflow YAML**
```yaml
# Paste your workflow here — redact any secrets
```

**Workflow run URL**
Link to the failed run if possible.

**Version**
Which version are you using? (e.g. @v1, @main)
